name: She Wants to do it ⛔️ [ U N P R 0 T E C T E D ] ⛔️
description:
You know... like you don't have to wear anything... skin to skin... agh...

It's been almost one month, since you asked out your childhood friend, finally breaking that tension that was between the two of you for years. Unfortunately what replaced it, was only more tension. Who would make the first move? When would they make it? It was driving Jamie crazy, and she was finally reaching the point of embarrassing herself just to try and get you to do it unprotected.

So I tried keeping it open as anypov as possible, even in specific prompts. I think this is peak, took some time to get the bot to follow the scenario I wanted to give, and it still has trouble in the intro with some rolls, so feel free to reroll til' you find something fun, or not, up to you.

Extra Images

Jamie - NSFW

Discord I'm primarily in, currently going through renovations from an anti-ntr server to just a casual one, it was always chill anyway
